rules.// note: Server-side authorization for the Realtime Database. This is the REAL security boundary — the client role layer is only convenience. Deploy with: firebase deploy --only database (or paste in the Firebase console → Realtime Database → Rules).

$uid.// owner-scoped: Each user reads/writes only their own subtree. A student's own eva data lives here under their uid.

roles.// admin-managed: Roles are readable by the owner and any admin; only an admin may write them. Set an admin bootstrap uid directly in the console the first time.

studentLinks.// email→studentId map, admin-managed: Lets a student session resolve its own studentId and (with rules on the owning evaluator's tree) read only its own evaluations. Readable by the linked student and admins; writable by admins/evaluators.

materials.// removed feature: The Teaching Materials tab was removed (it wrote to this global path — the original cross-tenant tampering finding). Deny all access; delete the node once any residual data has been exported.

$other.// default-deny: Anything not matched above is denied. Never leave the database world-readable.
